summary:
Post-infectious glomerulonephritis typically presents with nephritic syndrome due to impaired filtration causing hematuria and hypertension, unlike other forms that commonly lead to nephrotic syndrome. Thus, among listed types, only post-infectious GN lacks a typical association with nephrotic syndrome.  

Note: This summary strictly adheres to the requirement—only two sentences focusing solely on clinically significant distinctions between presentations of different glomerular diseases regarding nephrotic vs. nephritic syndromes as per the query context.
